title: Multi-Brand Gift Cards
description: Where can I use multi-brand gift cards in France, and which retailers accept them?
narrative: The user is seeking information on the acceptance networks of multi-brand gift cards such as UpCadhoc, CADO, and Illinocado across France. They want to know which physical stores, websites, and categories (e.g., fashion, beauty, leisure) accept these cards, and may also be interested in locating nearby redeeming outlets via maps or digital tools. Relevance is determined by explicit mentions of partner networks, redemption locations, geographic coverage, and usability across e-commerce and brick-and-mortar stores for these specific gift card brands.

title: Moroccan Lamb Tajine
description: What are the authentic ingredients and cooking methods for a traditional Moroccan lamb tajine?
narrative: The user seeks authentic, culturally accurate recipes for Moroccan lamb tajine, emphasizing traditional spices (like saffron, ras el hanout, coriander), cooking techniques (slow simmering in a tagine vessel), and key ingredients (candied lemons, green olives, potatoes or rice). Relevance is determined by recipes that prioritize regional authenticity over modern adaptations, include detailed step-by-step preparation using traditional tools, and reflect North African culinary heritage rather than simplified or Westernized versions.

title: Lotus Elise Purchase
description: What are the best used Lotus Elise models available for sale in France, and how can I verify their condition and market value?
narrative: The user is seeking to purchase a used Lotus Elise, a premium sports car, and wants to identify well-maintained models with low mileage and accurate pricing. They need reliable information on vehicle history, market value (e.g., via Argus or ParuVendu.fr valuations), and guidance on avoiding scams such as odometer fraud. Relevance is determined by ads that include detailed technical specs, service history, verified ownership records, and pricing aligned with industry benchmarks like the Argus guide. Listings from trusted platforms (e.g., auto-occasion.fr, ParuVendu.fr, Annonces-Automobile.com) that offer vehicle history checks (Histovec) or inspection reports are preferred.

title: Veal Paupiettes Recipe
description: What are the best traditional and modern recipes for veal paupiettes, including cooking techniques, ingredient substitutions, and serving suggestions?
narrative: The user seeks comprehensive guidance on preparing veal paupiettes, valuing both authentic French methods and adaptable variations—such as substituting white wine with lemon water or adding cream and herbs. Relevance is determined by recipes that detail preparation steps, cooking times, stuffing options, sauce pairings, and user-tested modifications. Recipes that explain how to avoid drying out the meat, recommend accompaniments, or share practical tips from home cooks are particularly valuable.

title: Solar Window Film
description: What are the legal and practical considerations for installing solar-tinted film on car windows to reduce heat and UV exposure while ensuring compliance with visibility regulations?
narrative: The user seeks information on the suitability, legality, and benefits of applying solar-tinted film to vehicle windows, particularly focusing on compliance with visibility standards (e.g., minimum 70% TLV on front windows) and the differences between front and rear window regulations. They are likely a car owner looking to improve comfort, safety, and energy efficiency without violating traffic laws. Relevance is determined by content that clarifies legal limits, product types (pre-cut vs. cut-to-fit), UV/heat protection claims, installation methods, and safety benefits—excluding unrelated topics like sun visors or general car maintenance.

title: Petit Bateau Adult Wear
description: What adult clothing options does Petit Bateau offer, and how do they reflect the brand’s classic children’s clothing aesthetic?
narrative: The user is interested in Petit Bateau’s adult apparel line — including women’s and men’s clothing, underwear, and accessories — and wants to understand how these products extend the brand’s signature style (e.g., marinière tops, organic cotton, timeless basics) from children’s wear to adult fashion. Relevance is determined by content that details the adult collection’s design philosophy, product categories, material quality, and connection to the brand’s heritage, excluding only information focused solely on baby or children’s products.

title: Renault Employee Discounts
description: How can consumers access pricing equivalent to Renault employee discounts without being a staff member?
narrative: The user seeks to understand alternative pathways to obtain the same deep discounts typically reserved for Renault employees, such as through third-party agents like Elite-Auto.fr, which claim to match or replicate those savings on new vehicles. Relevance is determined by content that explains mechanisms, eligibility, or services enabling non-employees to access employee-level pricing, including discount percentages, contractual terms, and comparisons between direct employee purchases and third-party services. Information about actual employee sales programs without a third-party intermediary is less relevant.

title: War School E-books
description: How can I legally purchase, download, and read e-books from the School of War, and what are the compatible formats and devices?
narrative: The user seeks to acquire digital publications from the School of War’s official editions, requiring clear guidance on purchase procedures, file formats (epub2, mobi, azw3), device compatibility (tablets, Kindle, computers via Calibre), and secure payment methods. Relevance is determined by documents detailing download links, format specifications, software recommendations, and payment security via Société Générale; information about print-on-demand delays, account management, and cookie policies is secondary but may inform user expectations about delivery and site functionality.

title: Unemployment Reentry
description: What are the conditions and options for a previously unemployed person to regain or increase unemployment benefits after returning to work and becoming unemployed again?
narrative: The user is a jobseeker who previously received unemployment benefits (ARE), returned to work for at least six months, and is now unemployed again. They want to understand whether they can resume their previous benefits, qualify for new benefits through reloading, or exercise the 'right of option' to receive a higher allowance based on their most recent, better-paid job. Relevance depends on accurate details about qualifying work periods (910 hours/130 days), involuntary job loss, time limits (3-year forfeiture period), and the 30% income increase threshold for the right of option. The user seeks clarity on which path maximizes their benefits without forfeiting entitlements unnecessarily.

title: AXA Client Access
description: How can policyholders and banking customers securely access their AXA client spaces for insurance and banking services?
narrative: The user needs clear, authoritative guidance on accessing their AXA client area, distinguishing between insurance (axa.fr) and banking (axabanque.fr) portals, recovering lost credentials, and verifying website security to avoid phishing. Relevance is determined by accurate instructions for login procedures, official URLs, security best practices, and support options for forgotten passwords or authentication errors—excluding general company information or unrelated product details.

title: Electric Car Incentives
description: What government incentives and financial aids are available for purchasing new or used electric vehicles in France, and how do they affect overall cost compared to conventional cars?
narrative: The user is considering purchasing an electric vehicle in France and wants to understand the full range of financial incentives—such as the ecological bonus, conversion premium, retrofit aid, and registration tax exemption—to determine the true net cost difference between electric and internal combustion engine vehicles. Relevance is determined by documents that detail specific aid amounts, income thresholds, eligibility criteria (e.g., scrapping old vehicles, vehicle price caps), and how these incentives offset the higher upfront cost of electric cars. Information on battery leasing, used EV bonuses, and regional aids also contributes to relevance.

title: Bicarbonate for Mildew
description: Can baking soda be used effectively and safely to prevent or treat downy mildew and late blight in tomato and potato crops?
narrative: The user is a home gardener seeking a natural, non-toxic alternative to chemical fungicides for controlling downy mildew and late blight on tomatoes and potatoes. They want to know if a bicarbonate solution is scientifically supported, how to prepare and apply it correctly, and whether produce affected by the disease remains safe to eat or use for seeding. Relevance includes practical application instructions, safety for consumption, environmental benefits, and evidence-based efficacy—not anecdotal advice or unrelated uses of bicarbonate.

title: Three Days of Darkness
description: What is the spiritual and eschatological significance of the 'Three Days of Darkness' prophecy, and how do various sources interpret its connection to planetary transformation, human consciousness, and cosmic events?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the meaning and convergence of the 'Three Days of Darkness' prophecy as described in mystical, religious, and New Age texts, particularly through the lens of Monique Mathieu’s channeling and Padre Pio’s prophecies. They are interested in whether this event is symbolic of a collective spiritual awakening or a literal cosmic phenomenon tied to pole shifts, celestial bodies like Nibiru, and global purification. Relevance is determined by documents that explicitly link the three days to vibrational shifts, divine intervention, human consciousness evolution, or astronomical events, while excluding purely speculative or debunked claims without textual grounding in the provided sources.

title: La Folle Histoire de l'Espace
description: Where can I legally stream the 1987 Mel Brooks sci-fi comedy 'La Folle Histoire de l'Espace' with French audio or subtitles?
narrative: The user is seeking a legitimate, high-quality streaming source for the 1987 film 'La Folle Histoire de l'Espace' (Spaceballs), specifically with French language options (VF or subtitles). They are not interested in pirated links, torrent sites, or unofficial streaming platforms. Relevance is determined by official or licensed platforms offering the film in French with clear labeling of audio/subtitle options, preferably with legal access and no malware risks. Sites like FILMube.com that offer free streaming without proper licensing are not acceptable, even if they provide French audio—only authorized distributors (e.g., Netflix, Amazon Prime, or official studio platforms) qualify as relevant.

title: Bureau des Légendes
description: What are the critical themes and character arcs in the French spy series Le Bureau des Légendes, particularly regarding identity, loyalty, and realism in espionage?
narrative: The user seeks a nuanced understanding of the series’ exploration of psychological immersion in false identities, moral ambiguity in intelligence work, and its acclaimed realism inspired by real-world espionage practices. Relevance is determined by content that analyzes character development (e.g., Malotru’s blurring of real and fabricated selves), institutional tensions (DGSE vs. CIA), narrative structure, and the show’s adherence to John le Carré-style authenticity over action tropes. Reviews, creator interviews, and production insights that discuss these themes are highly relevant; purely streaming links or cast lists without analytical depth are not.

title: Prevail Usage
description: How is the verb 'prevail' used in different contexts, including its meanings of dominance, occurrence, and taking advantage?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the nuanced semantic variations of the verb 'prevail' as used in French literary and historical texts, particularly distinguishing between its senses of triumphing over others, describing prevailing conditions, and taking advantage of circumstances. Relevant documents must illustrate these distinct uses with authentic examples from 19th- and 20th-century French literature or linguistic analysis, avoiding mere conjugation tables or dictionary definitions without contextual usage.

title: Cultural Immersion
description: What are the most impactful encounters between celebrities and isolated indigenous communities in the French TV series Rendez-vous en terre inconnu?
narrative: The user seeks to understand how the show facilitates profound cultural exchanges by placing well-known French personalities in remote, underserved communities around the world. Relevance is determined by episodes that highlight authentic interactions, emotional transformation, and respectful representation of indigenous cultures—particularly those threatened by modernization. The user values narratives that emphasize mutual learning, cultural preservation, and the human connection forged across vast cultural divides, rather than superficial tourism or exoticism.

title: Diarrhea Diet
description: What foods and drinks should be consumed or avoided during an episode of diarrhea to aid recovery and prevent worsening symptoms?
narrative: The user is seeking evidence-based dietary guidance to manage acute diarrhea, focusing on safe, easily digestible foods that reduce intestinal irritation and promote rehydration. Relevant information includes cooked low-fiber vegetables (e.g., carrots, zucchini), refined starches (white rice, steamed potatoes), cooked fruits (apples, pears), lean proteins (chicken, cod), raw vegetable oils in moderation, firm cheeses in small amounts, and hydrating fluids like water and herbal teas—while avoiding raw foods, high-fiber items, dairy (except specific cheeses), sugary drinks, and fatty meats. The user's intent is practical, immediate dietary adjustment for symptom relief, not general nutrition advice.

title: Paris Event Space
description: What large event venues are available for rent in Paris, particularly those with high capacity and frequent usage?
narrative: The user is seeking a venue in Paris capable of hosting large-scale events, with specific interest in spaces that accommodate over 200,000 visitors annually and offer significant square footage (e.g., 3000 m²). Relevance is determined by the venue's size, event volume, location within Paris, and availability for rental—making Espace Charenton a strong match due to its scale and active event calendar.

title: Green Energy Suppliers
description: Which electricity suppliers offer transparent, affordable, and truly renewable energy with flexible, non-binding contracts and strong customer service?
narrative: The user seeks to switch to an electricity supplier that provides 100% renewable energy (electricity, gas, or wood) with clear pricing, no hidden fees, and genuine environmental commitment—verified through Guarantees of Origin. They prioritize transparency in billing, digital tools for consumption tracking, responsive French-based customer service, and the ability to switch without penalties. Relevance is determined by suppliers offering verifiable green sources, dynamic pricing or cost-price models, mobile app integration, and non-binding contracts, excluding providers with opaque practices or fossil fuel dependencies.

title: EV6 Comparison
description: What are the key differences in performance, price, and features between the Kia EV6 trim levels and how do they compare to other electric vehicles in the same segment?
narrative: The user is evaluating the Kia EV6 for purchase and wants to understand the trade-offs between its trim levels (Active, Design, GT Line, GT) in terms of power, range, charging speed, technology, and cost. They are also interested in how the EV6 stacks up against competitors like the Tesla Model Y or Hyundai Ioniq 5, particularly regarding real-world autonomy, value for money, and available incentives. Relevance is determined by detailed comparisons of specifications, pricing adjustments post-launch, availability of features like V2L or heat pumps in specific markets, and user-reported reliability or ownership experiences.

title: Gallic Ancestors
description: What is the historical origin and political evolution of the idea that modern French people are descended from the ancient Gauls?
narrative: The user seeks to understand how the myth of 'our ancestors the Gauls' was constructed, promoted, and later challenged in French national identity. Relevance is determined by content that traces the term 'Gallic' from Julius Caesar’s usage, through its instrumentalization in 19th-century school textbooks under the Second Empire and Third Republic, to its critique in the 20th century due to immigration and scholarly revisionism. Materials that discuss the diversity of ancient populations in Gaul, the role of propaganda in nation-building, and the disconnect between historical reality and popular myth are highly relevant. Documents that merely describe ancient Gaulish tribes without addressing the modern ideological construction of the myth are less relevant.

title: Algarve Car Rental
description: What are the best-value car rental options at Faro Airport for a road trip across the Algarve, with free cancellation and minimal hidden fees?
narrative: The user plans a road trip through the Algarve region and needs to rent a car at Faro Airport (FAO) with flexible cancellation terms, transparent pricing, and reliable service. They prioritize companies offering free cancellation up to 24 hours before pickup, no hidden charges (e.g., toll devices, insurance upsells), and high customer satisfaction ratings. They are wary of providers with poor reviews regarding unexpected fees or unhelpful staff, especially those that charge extra for returning the car at a different location. Relevance is determined by rental companies that combine low daily rates (under €20), strong customer ratings (above 8/10), free cancellation, and clear communication about insurance and toll systems. Providers like Sixt, Avis, and Thrifty with consistently high ratings and transparent policies are preferred over those with complaints about hidden costs, such as Hertz or InterRent.

title: Nantes Station Car Rental
description: What are the 24/7 self-service car and utility rental options available at Nantes South Station for travelers arriving by train, especially those under 21 or seeking low-cost, one-way rentals?
narrative: The user is a traveler arriving at Nantes South Station (Gare Sud) by train and needs immediate, flexible vehicle access without waiting for agency hours. They may be under 21 (limiting options), require a utility vehicle for moving or work, and prefer one-way rentals or low-cost daily rates. Relevance is determined by agencies offering 24/7 self-service, age flexibility (e.g., ADA’s 18+ option), utility vehicle availability, one-way policies, and proximity to the train station. Agencies like ADA and Europcar are prioritized over airport-only providers like SIXT, and pricing under €20/day for utilities or €45/day for cars is a key criterion.

title: Potato Disease Management
description: What are the most effective integrated strategies for preventing and controlling major fungal and bacterial diseases in potato crops, including late blight, Alternaria, Rhizoctonia, and silver scab, while minimizing chemical inputs?
narrative: The user is seeking comprehensive, practical guidance on managing key potato diseases through a combination of agronomic practices, resistant varieties, and targeted fungicide use. Relevance is determined by documents that detail symptom identification, environmental triggers, preventive measures (e.g., crop rotation, sanitation, resistant cultivars), and judicious chemical control—prioritizing integrated approaches over standalone solutions. Information on storage conditions, adjuvants, and biostimulants that enhance disease resistance is also relevant, while unrelated agricultural topics (e.g., tractors, Ukrainian maize) are not.

title: Beaujolais Wines
description: What are the different types of Beaujolais wines beyond Beaujolais Nouveau, and how do they differ in taste, quality, and aging potential?
narrative: The user is seeking to understand the full spectrum of Beaujolais wines, not just the widely marketed Beaujolais Nouveau. They want to distinguish between the basic AOCs (Beaujolais and Beaujolais-Villages) and the ten prestigious crus (e.g., Morgon, Fleurie, Moulin-à-Vent), including their flavor profiles, terroir influences, and recommended drinking windows. Relevance is determined by content that details grape variety (Gamay), production methods, aging capabilities, food pairings, and regional distinctions — excluding promotional or commercial content focused solely on Nouveau’s launch date or discounts.

title: Boat Shoes Style
description: What are the best men's boat shoes for casual urban wear that combine nautical heritage, comfort, and modern style?
narrative: The user is seeking men's boat shoes that are not only authentic to their nautical origins but also suitable for everyday city wear. They value quality materials (like leather or nubuck), non-slip soles for safety, and versatile designs that pair well with jeans, chinos, or casual outfits. Relevance is determined by products that emphasize both functional features (e.g., Technigrip soles, waterproofing) and fashion appeal (e.g., color options, modern silhouettes), particularly from brands like TBS that blend heritage with contemporary style. The user is not interested in purely athletic or formal footwear, but rather in shoes that bridge seaside tradition with urban chic.

title: Affordable Electric Cars
description: What are the most cost-effective electric vehicles available in France with government incentives and flexible long-term leasing options?
narrative: The user is seeking affordable electric vehicles in France, prioritizing low monthly payments, government eco-bonuses (e.g., €6,000), and long-term leasing (LLD) with minimal upfront costs. They are likely a private individual looking to transition to electric mobility without a large initial outlay, and are interested in models like the Twingo E-Tech Electric and Zoe E-Tech, which offer reduced first rents after bonus deductions. Relevance is determined by vehicles with advertised leasing deals under €250/month after incentives, eligibility for ecological bonuses, and availability through Renault’s official offers. Vehicles without clear pricing, leasing terms, or incentive eligibility are not relevant.

title: Corfu Car Rental
description: What are the best options for renting a car in Corfu with free cancellation, unlimited mileage, and lowest prices?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Corfu and wants to rent a car that offers flexibility and value. They prioritize agencies with free cancellation and unlimited mileage to avoid unexpected fees, while seeking the lowest possible daily rates—often found through intermediary sites like Auto Europe or Govoyages. Relevance is determined by agencies offering all three criteria: low cost, free cancellation, and unlimited mileage; popular choices include Sixt, Rent&Go, and AcaRent. The user is not interested in general car rental information unless it directly addresses these specific conditions.

title: Car Rental in Réunion
description: What are the best car rental options on Réunion Island for tourists seeking flexible pickup/drop-off locations, all-inclusive insurance, and affordable rates?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Réunion Island and needs to rent a car to explore its diverse landscapes, including volcanic terrain, beaches, and towns. They prioritize agencies that offer convenient pickup/drop-off at airports or hotels, unlimited mileage, comprehensive insurance, and free extras like child seats. Relevance is determined by agencies that explicitly mention these services—such as My Car Loc and SG SERVICES—and avoid those with hidden fees or limited coverage. The user also values transparent pricing, 24/7 support, and positive customer reviews, making affordability combined with reliability the key criteria for relevance.

title: American Car Brands
description: Which American car brands are currently active, what are their historical backgrounds, and how do their logos reflect their heritage and identity?
narrative: The user seeks to identify surviving American automobile manufacturers, understand their historical evolution, and learn how their logos symbolize brand identity, heritage, and corporate lineage. Relevance is determined by documents that list active brands (e.g., Ford, Chevrolet, Tesla, Ram), detail the origin and design of their logos (e.g., Cadillac’s coat of arms, Buick’s Scottish shields), and mention discontinued brands (e.g., Pontiac, Plymouth) to provide context. Information about corporate restructuring (e.g., Ram splitting from Dodge) and brand positioning (e.g., Lincoln as Ford’s luxury arm) adds depth. Excluded are non-American brands, used car listings, or unrelated European market data.

title: Mad Max Revenge
description: What are the psychological and narrative motivations behind Max Rockatansky's descent into vengeance in the film Mad Max, and how does the film portray justice in a lawless society?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the transformation of Max Rockatansky from a disciplined highway patrol officer into a lone avenger after the brutal murder of his family, exploring how the film uses his quest for retribution to critique societal collapse and the failure of institutional justice. Relevant materials must detail Max’s emotional arc, the breakdown of legal systems, and the symbolic use of violence as personal justice, particularly focusing on his final confrontation with the gang and the ambiguous moral resolution of his actions. Documents that analyze the film’s themes of revenge, dystopia, and the loss of humanity are most relevant, while those discussing compensation for real-world road accidents are irrelevant.

title: Concerts at Arkéa Arena
description: What upcoming concerts are scheduled at Arkéa Arena in Bordeaux and who are the performing artists?
narrative: The user is seeking information about future musical events at Arkéa Arena, specifically interested in artist names, performance dates, and possibly ticket availability. Relevance is determined by documents listing confirmed concert events with artists (e.g., Michel Jonasz, Vald, -M-) and their scheduled dates in 2020. Information about parking, accessibility, or general arena contact details is secondary unless directly tied to event attendance.

title: Women's Rural Voices
description: What archival records exist documenting the lived experiences of women farmers in Indre-et-Loire during the 1960s-70s?
narrative: The user seeks historical primary sources that capture the perspectives of rural women in Indre-et-Loire, particularly those who wrote to journalist Menie Grégoire between 1969 and 1976. Relevant documents include letters archived under fonds 66J, which reveal daily struggles, aspirations, and social conditions of women farmers during that era. Materials from the Departmental Archives that directly feature these letters, or are part of curated exhibitions or digitized collections stemming from them, are relevant; general archival announcements or unrelated events (e.g., Wikipedia workshops or carnival photos) are not.

title: Energy Bill Disputes
description: How can consumers effectively challenge erroneous energy bills and navigate the formal complaint process with suppliers and ombudsmen?
narrative: Users seek clear, step-by-step guidance on disputing inaccurate or inflated energy bills, including legal time limits, escalation procedures within supplier organizations (e.g., ENGIE), and when and how to involve the National Energy Ombudsman. Relevance is determined by content that outlines actionable steps, timelines (e.g., 5-year consumer limitation period), required documentation, contact details for customer service and mediation bodies, and the role of mediation in suspending legal deadlines. Information that is generic, promotional, or focused solely on price trends without dispute resolution mechanisms is not relevant.

title: Budget Tech Bundle
description: What combination of a new computer and complementary software or service subscriptions offers the best value under €1,500 with bundled promotions?
narrative: The user is looking to purchase a new desktop or laptop computer within a budget of €1,500 and wants to maximize value by taking advantage of bundled promotions—such as discounted Microsoft 365 Family subscriptions or free months of Deezer Premium—that are offered when purchasing eligible devices. They are not seeking the highest-end specs but rather the most cost-effective package that includes useful add-ons. Relevance is determined by products priced at or below €1,500 that include time-limited software or service bundles, excluding standalone hardware without promotions. Devices with combined discounts that reduce the effective price significantly (e.g., €1,196.99 after €40 discount) and include valuable extras like 4 months of Deezer or Microsoft 365 are considered highly relevant.

title: Silver Print Heritage
description: What are the historical techniques, materials, and artistic values of traditional silver-based photographic printing processes, and why do they remain culturally significant today?
narrative: The user seeks to understand the evolution, craftsmanship, and enduring cultural value of silver print photography—from early processes like albumen and gelatin silver prints to their role in artistic and archival contexts. Relevance is determined by documents that detail historical methods (e.g., collodion, albumin, gelatin bromide), the materiality of silver halides and paper substrates, the work of key innovators (Maddox, Eastman, Lumière), and contemporary reflections on analog photography as a tangible heritage in contrast to digital immateriality. Documents that discuss the tactile, chemical, and aesthetic qualities of silver prints, or their preservation in art and memory, are most relevant.

title: Leek Quiche Variations
description: What are the most popular and flavorful variations of leek quiche, including regional, vegetarian, and gourmet twists?
narrative: The user is seeking diverse recipes for leek quiche that go beyond the traditional version, with interest in unique ingredient combinations such as cheese (e.g., stilton, feta, munster, chaource), additions like smoked salmon, tofu, or lardons, and flavor enhancements like honey, curry, or nutmeg. Relevance is determined by recipes that offer distinct regional, dietary, or gourmet adaptations, excluding basic or generic versions. The user likely wants inspiration for meals ranging from casual dinners to elegant appetizers, and may be interested in vegetarian options or techniques like freezing for meal prep.

title: Car Games
description: What free online car games offer realistic driving, stunts, and customization similar to Gran Turismo or Need for Speed, and allow multiplayer interaction?
narrative: The user seeks free, browser-based car games that emulate the depth and realism of premium titles like Gran Turismo and Need for Speed, including features such as vehicle upgrades, drift mechanics, open-world exploration, and online multiplayer modes. Relevance is determined by games that provide realistic physics, customization options, and social play—such as Madalin Stunt Cars 2 or Drift Hunters—while excluding simplistic or flash-based games no longer supported. Games that include car park challenges, highway racing, or demolition derbies are also relevant if they offer meaningful progression and multiplayer functionality.

title: Mobility Aid
description: What financial assistance is available to unemployed jobseekers in France for travel, accommodation, and meals when attending job interviews or training far from home?
narrative: The user is a registered jobseeker in France seeking to understand the eligibility criteria, types, and limits of mobility assistance provided by Pôle emploi for geographically distant job-related activities. They need detailed, up-to-date information on reimbursement rates (e.g., €0.20/km, €30/night for accommodation), application procedures, time limits (e.g., apply before or within 7 days of interview), and alternative support like SNCF vouchers or SAM host family programs. Relevance is determined by accuracy of financial thresholds, geographic conditions (60km/2hr rule), documentation requirements, and distinctions between mobility aid types (job interview, training, return-to-work). Information on international mobility or vehicle repair aid is irrelevant unless directly related to domestic jobseeker mobility.

title: SFR Client Access
description: How can SFR customers log in to their client area to manage bills, consumption, and account settings?
narrative: Users need step-by-step guidance on accessing the SFR Client Area (espace client) to view and manage their mobile or ADSL accounts, including retrieving bills, checking usage, resetting passwords, or linking email accounts. Relevance is determined by content that provides clear instructions for authentication, troubleshooting login issues, or navigating the SFR & Me app and online portal — specifically for individual (not business) customers. Information about LICO (SFR’s billing/usage platform) and community forums is relevant if it directly aids access or account management.

title: Oil Lamp Restoration
description: What are the best replacement parts and compatible fuels for restoring vintage or artisanal oil lamps to functional and safe working condition?
narrative: The user is seeking to restore or maintain an antique or artisanal oil lamp, likely for decorative, nostalgic, or emergency use. They need specific, compatible replacement components such as wicks (cotton or fiberglass), glass chimneys, and fuel recommendations that ensure safe, clean, and efficient burning. Relevance is determined by products explicitly designed for vintage or handmade lamps (e.g., Feuerhand, Gaudard), materials matching original specifications (e.g., 100% cotton wicks in 42mm/66mm sizes), and guidance on proper fuel types (e.g., purified kerosene, soybean oil) and refilling safety practices. Generic modern lamps or electrical alternatives are not relevant.

title: Madeira Car Rental
description: What are the key considerations for renting a car in Madeira, including cost, insurance, vehicle type, and rental agencies?
narrative: The user is planning a trip to Madeira and wants to rent a car to explore the island efficiently, balancing flexibility with budget constraints. They need detailed, practical advice on choosing a rental agency (e.g., Avis, Europcar, Goldcar), understanding hidden costs like deductible insurance (franchise), selecting an appropriate vehicle type for Madeira’s mountainous roads, and optimizing expenses through pre-booking, credit card benefits, and seasonal pricing. Relevance is determined by content that addresses real-world experiences, cost breakdowns, insurance options, and local tips—not just generic rental information.

title: Perfect Baked Potatoes
description: What is the optimal method and timing for baking small potatoes to achieve a crispy exterior and tender interior without over- or under-cooking?
narrative: The user seeks a reliable, tested method for baking small potatoes—specifically pomegranate or new potatoes—that ensures even cooking, proper browning, and ideal texture. Relevance is determined by recipes that address variable cooking times, oven temperatures, seasoning techniques, and corrections from user feedback; instructions that acknowledge common pitfalls (e.g., 20-minute cooking time being insufficient) and offer adjustments (e.g., 45–60 minutes, checking doneness with a knife, using herbs or garlic for flavor) are highly relevant. Advice on potato type, skin retention, and cooking vessels (e.g., foil vs. parchment) also contributes to relevance.

title: Return-to-Work Bonus
description: What are the eligibility criteria, application process, and current status of France's Return-to-Work Bonus for former RSA or SSA recipients returning to employment?
narrative: The user is a former recipient of RSA or SSA who has recently resumed employment and seeks to understand whether they qualify for the €1,000 Return-to-Work Bonus. They need clarity on the legal requirements—including minimum hours (78/month), duration of employment (4 months, or 1 month under exceptional circumstances), and which agency to apply to (Pôle Emploi or CAF)—as well as confirmation that the bonus still exists despite conflicting online information. Relevance depends on accurate, up-to-date official criteria, documentation requirements, and whether the bonus has been replaced by the RSA 'activity' benefit since 2016. Information must distinguish between the discontinued national bonus and regional APRE assistance, which may still be available.
